CREATE TABLE uuid_test (uuid UUID, timestamp DateTime64(3));
SELECT UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid, 'Europe/London') FROM uuid_test WHERE timestamp IS NOT NULL;
SELECT UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid) AS utc_time, UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid, 'America/New_York') AS est_time FROM uuid_test;
SELECT uuid, UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid) AS utc_timestamp FROM uuid_test WHERE UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid) > '2024-04-22 00:00:00.000';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuid_test WHERE UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid) < '2024-01-01 00:00:00.000';
SELECT uuid FROM uuid_test WHERE UUIDv7ToDateTime(uuid, 'Asia/Tokyo') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT UUIDv7ToDateTime(toUUID('d1bc78e7-b9e3-7ca8-bc4c-7d1a53812345'), 'America/Los_Angeles') FROM uuid_test WHERE uuid = toUUID('d1bc78e7-b9e3-7ca8-bc4c-7d1a53812345');
SELECT t1.uuid, UUIDv7ToDateTime(t1.uuid) FROM (SELECT toUUID('018f05c9-4ab8-7b86-b64e-c9f03fbd45d1') AS uuid) AS t1 JOIN uuid_test AS t2 ON t1.uuid = t2.uuid;
